markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Content audit and workflow optimization discussion for GrowthX's AI-assisted content creation process.](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shift away from word count-based deliverables to focus on quality and readability](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Enhance polishing instructions with detailed do's and don'ts for each client](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
  - [Address issues with AI-generated content, particularly hallucinated stats and links](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Implement more narrative-driven content with varied "geometric" structures for better readability](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)

## Topics

### SEO-Driven Content Strategies

  - [Utilize meta fields for SEO keywords, allowing more human-readable titles in content](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Consider using table of contents for better Google snippets](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Balance SEO requirements with readability and narrative flow](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)

### AI Content Generation Challenges

  - [Hallucinated stats and links are major time-sinks for editors](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [AI tends to overuse bullet points and create "bullet point sandwiches"](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [Tone consistency issues, especially for clients requiring a balance (e.g., playful yet professional)](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [Outlines often need manual refinement before content generation](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)

### Improving Workflow Instructions

  - [Current polishing instructions are insufficient; need significant expansion](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [New standard: extensive, detailed instructions with specific do's and don'ts](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - [Example shared from AIMBIT project: multi-page document with comprehensive guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Instructions should include negative examples ("instead of this, use that")](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=1674.0)

### Content Structure and Readability

  - [Aim for "geometric" variety in content structure to improve readability](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
  - [Avoid walls of text and overly skeletal content](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Use varied paragraph lengths and occasional single-sentence paragraphs for emphasis](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)

### Client-Specific Calibration

  - [Implement a new process for kicking off clients with intense calibration](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
  - [Create detailed writing guides for each client based on feedback and collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [Use tools like Perplexity AI to generate initial writing guides from collected feedback](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review and expand polishing instructions for all clients, especially Not Boring Design](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)
  - [Create comprehensive writing guides for each client if not already present](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [Implement additional feedback steps in the workflow if necessary](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
  - [Address linking issues through improved validation processes](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Share updated best practices for polishing instructions across the team](https://fathom.video/share/AmVAFZs8z8RWNdexd9zMMQ2z7mHes3G5?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
